heading: Returns relating to credit for health insurance costs of eligible individuals
label: 6050T Returns relating to credit for health insurance costs of eligible individuals

children.heading: Requirement of reporting
children.label: a Requirement of reporting
children.text: Every person who is entitled to receive payments for any month of any calendar year under section 7527 (relating to advance payment of credit for health insurance costs of eligible individuals) with respect to any certified individual (as defined in section 7527(c)) shall, at such time as the Secretary may prescribe, make the return described in subsection (b) with respect to each such individual.

children.heading: Form and manner of returns
children.label: b Form and manner of returns

children.text: is in such form as the Secretary may prescribe, and

children.label: A
children.text: the name, address, and TIN of each individual referred to in subsection (a),

children.label: B
children.text: the number of months for which amounts were entitled to be received with respect to such individual under section 7527 (relating to advance payment of credit for health insurance costs of eligible individuals),

children.label: C
children.text: the amount entitled to be received for each such month, and

children.label: D
children.text: such other information as the Secretary may prescribe.

children.heading: Statements to be furnished to individuals with respect to whom information is required
children.label: c Statements to be furnished to individuals with respect to whom information is required

children.text: the name and address of the person required to make such return and the phone number of the information contact for such person, and
the information required to be shown on the return with respect to such individual.
